ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of bookmark */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the URL associated with the bookmark */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group the bookmark belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bookmark */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the bookmark was added */,
  "visual_order" INTEGER /* Order of the bookmark within its group for visual display */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent bookmark if nested */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the bookmark was last modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the bookmark */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the bookmark is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key for the bookmark */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the bookmark is pinned */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the bookmark is shared */,
  "share_link" TEXT /* Share link for the bookmark */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the bookmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES bookmark_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmark type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bookmark type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the type is a default type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL stored in the bookmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or metadata about the URL */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the URL is valid */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last validity check */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the URL has been visited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmark group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bookmark group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the group */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the group is shared */,
  "share_link" TEXT /* Share link for the group */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the group is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bookmark_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the bookmark */,
  "is_owner" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is the owner of the bookmark */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access to the bookmark is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key for the bookmark access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmark_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookmark_access_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tag is a default tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the tag for visual differentiation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_tag_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tag_associations_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tag_associations_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES bookmark_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the change was made by an automated process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_history_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similar_bookmarks" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original bookmark */,
  "similar_bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suggested similar bookmark */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Score representing the similarity between bookmarks */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the suggestion is made */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the suggestion has been accepted by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similar_bookmarks_similar_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similar_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similar_bookmarks_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_sync" (
  "sync_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synchronization event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the last synchronization occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the synchronization */,
  "sync_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the synchronization in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sync_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sync_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sync_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Browser version of the device */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the device is the primary device for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the bookmark has been accessed */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the bookmark was last accessed */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the bookmark in seconds */,
  "is_frequent" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the bookmark is frequently used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)
